sentences.text: If the Sstvecd extension is implemented, then `stvec.MODE` must be capable of holding the value 0 (Direct).
sentences.section: Preamble > Sstvecd Extension for Direct Trap Vectoring, Version 1.0

sentences.text: Furthermore, when `stvec.MODE=Direct`, `stvec.BASE` must be capable of holding any valid four-byte-aligned address.
sentences.section: Preamble > Sstvecd Extension for Direct Trap Vectoring, Version 1.0
